### Known Issues

1. **Ticket 2 workbook mismatch** — The inject_scenario_02.py uses `area filter-list` on R2 ABR, but the workbook Section 9 Ticket 2 Fix block shows `clear ip ospf process`. The symptom matches but the diagnosis path diverges. Recommend updating the workbook Ticket 2 Fix to show the actual filter-list commands that the script injects.
